<link rel='stylesheet' id='dashicons-css' href='https://capobythesea.com/wp-includes/css/dashicons.min.css?ver=6.9.1' type='text/css' media='all' />

<style id='admin-bar-inline-css' type='text/css'>

    /* Hide CanvasJS credits for P404 charts specifically */
    #p404RedirectChart .canvasjs-chart-credit {
        display: none !important;
    }
    
    #p404RedirectChart canvas {
        border-radius: 6px;
    }

    .p404-redirect-adminbar-weekly-title {
        font-weight: bold;
        font-size: 14px;
        color: #fff;
        margin-bottom: 6px;
    }

    #wpadminbar #wp-admin-bar-p404_free_top_button .ab-icon:before {
        content: "\f103";
        color: #dc3545;
        top: 3px;
    }
    
    #wp-admin-bar-p404_free_top_button .ab-item {
        min-width: 80px !important;
        padding: 0px !important;
    }
    
    /* Ensure proper positioning and z-index for P404 dropdown */
    .p404-redirect-adminbar-dropdown-wrap { 
        min-width: 0; 
        padding: 0;
        position: static !important;
    }
    
    #wpadminbar #wp-admin-bar-p404_free_top_button_dropdown {
        position: static !important;
    }
    
    #wpadminbar #wp-admin-bar-p404_free_top_button_dropdown .ab-item {
        padding: 0 !important;
        margin: 0 !important;
    }
    
    .p404-redirect-dropdown-container {
        min-width: 340px;
        padding: 18px 18px 12px 18px;
        background: #23282d !important;
        color: #fff;
        border-radius: 12px;
        box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
        margin-top: 10px;
        position: relative !important;
        z-index: 999999 !important;
        display: block !important;
        border: 1px solid #444;
    }
    
    /* Ensure P404 dropdown appears on hover */
    #wpadminbar #wp-admin-bar-p404_free_top_button .p404-redirect-dropdown-container { 
        display: none !important;
    }
    
    #wpadminbar #wp-admin-bar-p404_free_top_button:hover .p404-redirect-dropdown-container { 
        display: block !important;
    }
    
    #wpadminbar #wp-admin-bar-p404_free_top_button:hover #wp-admin-bar-p404_free_top_button_dropdown .p404-redirect-dropdown-container {
        display: block !important;
    }
    
    .p404-redirect-card {
        background: #2c3338;
        border-radius: 8px;
        padding: 18px 18px 12px 18px;
        box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.07);
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        border: 1px solid #444;
    }
    
    .p404-redirect-btn {
        display: inline-block;
        background: #dc3545;
        color: #fff !important;
        font-weight: bold;
        padding: 5px 22px;
        border-radius: 8px;
        text-decoration: none;
        font-size: 17px;
        transition: background 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
        margin-top: 8px;
        box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(220,53,69,0.15);
        text-align: center;
        line-height: 1.6;
    }
    
    .p404-redirect-btn:hover {
        background: #c82333;
        color: #fff !important;
        box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(220,53,69,0.25);
    }
    
    /* Prevent conflicts with other admin bar dropdowns */
    #wpadminbar .ab-top-menu > li:hover > .ab-item,
    #wpadminbar .ab-top-menu > li.hover > .ab-item {
        z-index: auto;
    }
    
    #wpadminbar #wp-admin-bar-p404_free_top_button:hover > .ab-item {
        z-index: 999998 !important;
    }
    
/*# sourceURL=admin-bar-inline-css */
</style>

></div><div class="rpi-flx rpi-col6"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/112221734276358525101/reviews" class="wp-google-name" target="_blank" rel="nofollow noopener">adrienne woodward</a><div class="wp-google-time" data-time="1733257017">20:16 03 Dec 24</div></div></div><span class="rpi-stars" style="--rating:5"></span><div class="rpi-flx rpi-col4"><div class="wp-google-feedback grw-scroll" ><span class="wp-google-text">Capo By The Sea Review – A Life-Changing Experience<br /><br />I can honestly say that Capo By The Sea in Capistrano Beach, CA, has been nothing short of transformative for me. From the moment I arrived, I felt embraced by the warmth and dedication of the entire team, who are all genuinely invested in your recovery.<br /><br />The setting itself is incredible–beautiful, sunny Southern California with the soothing presence of the beach nearby. The living quarters and homes are gorgeous and comfortable, creating an atmosphere that feels like a safe, healing sanctuary. The structure of the program provides a perfect balance of freedom and accountability, allowing you to feel supported while still having the autonomy to grow and heal.<br /><br />Nicki, the program director, is an absolute gem! She leads with compassion, professionalism, and a deep understanding of the recovery process. The clinical team–Kim Glossbrenner, Jack Platt, Dr. Robin Fraser, and Terry Kellerman–are top-notch, providing personalized and thoughtful care to address the mental and emotional aspects of addiction recovery. They are also encouraging & willing to work with family members and loved ones in person or via Zoom, which is incredibly helpful in establishing a solid foundation for your continued recovery after returning home.<br /><br />The support staff, (in no particular order) including Cat, Randy, Manny, Jack, Coral, Ryan, Lucas, Destiny, Alyssa, Chris, Brent, Tim, Chelsea, and Tony, are always there with a smile, despite having to manage our countless & incredible needs! This helps to create a positive, loving & encouraging environment. They truly make Capo feel like a second home.<br /><br />One of the standout features of the program is its holistic approach. From acupuncture with Vida, meditation with Ingrid, breath-work with Matthew, Jeremy & Eric, yoga & sound baths with Ashly, and hiking in the stunning local landscape, Capo By The Sea offers a wide variety of therapeutic activities. The gym access is also great for physical health, and the massage therapy is a perfect way to relax and reset.<br /><br />In addition to these tools, the program offers a very solid AA/NA program which is imperative in your initial recovery & your hopeful continued success in sobriety.  The opportunities to grow as a happy & healthy human being and improve your life are limitless, if you truly want it.<br /><br />The food is also a major highlight. Executive chef Pablo prepares meals that are not only delicious but nourishing–he truly goes above and beyond to ensure that each meal supports both body and soul.<br /><br />John K. and Patty B., the owner & intake coordinator, respectively, have created something truly special here. Their passion for helping others is evident in every aspect of Capo By The Sea, and I am forever grateful for the miracles they are working.<br /><br />Having been here twice, I can confidently say that Capo By The Sea has changed my life in profound ways. It’s a place that feels like home, and I wholeheartedly recommend it to anyone seeking a supportive, comprehensive, and life-changing recovery experience.</span></div><div class="wp-google-img"><img decoding="async" class="rpi-thumb" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AB3l90CuB_ByBALR9ulwczRLCCTP47lWU-HjjjzNsmR1LedsiHJ1U2DnvjuNfb3dmNk0APyjOGglaK4wauGlmVW-jjPZKSNhOu2AnXWOwGcHFpIG5kIHk8NuQxfO9UqsN-le2DMAUes" alt="Photo from customer review" loading="lazy"><img decoding="async" class="rpi-thumb" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AB3l90DJELbKT_Pf9VgoJDdigqyqhKzrlIXT7HqIbgiBGo_dgmrpL85ajQe_FxMUsAsSIbEk9dPvgo-GreECG5-WVhVVdFpo2y92HZGpHUtSDDRoiO-bROgp6VIUcExN_9tevS7q2EB_mQ" alt="Photo from customer review" loading="lazy"></div></div><svg height="16" width="16" role="none"><use href="#grw-google"/></svg></div></div><div class="rpi-slide grw-review"><div class="rpi-flx rpi-col12 grw-review-inner grw-backgnd"><div class="rpi-flx rpi-row12-center"><div class="grw-img-wrap"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="grw-img" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9aMYOuQMylWHQqL9AMLQ1baOK9jKkDp-Aio7oeHB3tSGU26DcoA=s56-c-rp-mo-br100" loading="lazy" alt="James Harper profile picture" width="50" height="50" onerror="if(this.src!='https://capobythesea.com/wp-content/plugins/widget-google-reviews/assets/img/guest.png')this.src='https://capobythesea.com/wp-content/plugins/widget-google-reviews/assets/img/guest.png';" ></div><div class="rpi-flx rpi-col6"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/112265063285334909654/reviews" class="wp-google-name" target="_blank" rel="nofollow noopener">James Harper</a><div class="wp-google-time" data-time="1731530554">20:42 13 Nov 24</div></div></div><span class="rpi-stars" style="--rating:5"></span><div class="rpi-flx rpi-col4"><div class="wp-google-feedback grw-scroll" ><span class="wp-google-text">These people and staff are some of the most caring and kind people ever.  I struck a friendship with chef Pablo.  He checks on with me from time to time.  That aside, he’s a fantastic Chef!  More importantly, a good man.  I’m leaving people out, but Chelsea and Kimberly are amazing human beings.   I cherish my ongoing relationship with Chef Pablo. He cares</span></div></div><svg height="16" width="16" role="none"><use href="#grw-google"/></svg></div></div><div class="rpi-slide grw-review"><div class="rpi-flx rpi-col12 grw-review-inner grw-backgnd"><div class="rpi-flx rpi-row12-center"><div class="grw-img-wrap"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="grw-img" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLp466QS4oQiGkeUePGgqSWadbxAyXH7sBVRHy0trG_dy2rvQ=s56-c-rp-mo-br100" loading="lazy" alt="Rose Thomas profile picture" width="50" height="50" onerror="if(this.src!='https://capobythesea.com/wp-content/plugins/widget-google-reviews/assets/img/guest.png')this.src='https://capobythesea.com/wp-content/plugins/widget-google-reviews/assets/img/guest.png';" ></div><div class="rpi-flx rpi-col6"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115182461347457621451/reviews" class="wp-google-name" target="_blank" rel="nofollow noopener">Rose Thomas</a><div class="wp-google-time" data-time="1730774486">02:41 05 Nov 24</div></div></div><span class="rpi-stars" style="--rating:5"></span><div class="rpi-flx rpi-col4"><div class="wp-google-feedback grw-scroll" ><span class="wp-google-text">After decades of trying to get sober, I took myself to Capo by the Sea. Through the support and insight of the caring staff, therapists, and my fellow housemates, this well thought out, holistic, and immersive program gave this  72 year old woman a renewed sense of hope.<br /><br />Along with the therapy (group plus individual) there are a number of amenities; wonderful food prepared by Chef Pablo, massage therapy, acupuncture, yoga, and Saturday excursions, as well as free time every afternoon where you are encouraged to walk, go to the gym or just relax and watch a show. Just to drop a few names of people that stand out from my time at Capo; Chelsea, Chris, Ryan, Nikki, Destiny, Lucas, Therapists Kim, Cassie, Dr. Fraser, and Jack. But honestly, all the people that work there are genuine in their concern for your well-being.<br /><br />The environment at Capo is a safe haven that gives one the ability to see how recovery can lead to a better way of living without the use of drugs or alcohol. If you are willing to take advantage of all they have to offer, their program will help you understand that if you do the work, you will reap the benefits of a clean and sober life.</span></div></div><svg height="16" width="16" role="none"><use href="#grw-google"/></svg></div></div><div class="rpi-slide grw-review"><div class="rpi-flx rpi-col12 grw-review-inner grw-backgnd"><div class="rpi-flx rpi-row12-center"><div class="grw-img-wrap"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="grw-img" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSQMHtCIiX_EUEzXIHU3vXMNBOvFTJAFXvlud_FaKPt5QX8w=s56-c-rp-mo-br100" loading="lazy" alt="Kimberly Birch profile picture" width="50" height="50" onerror="if(this.src!='https://capobythesea.com/wp-content/plugins/widget-google-reviews/assets/img/guest.png')this.src='https://capobythesea.com/wp-content/plugins/widget-google-reviews/assets/img/guest.png';" ></div><div class="rpi-flx rpi-col6"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100344906112407275231/reviews" class="wp-google-name" target="_blank" rel="nofollow noopener">Kimberly Birch</a><div class="wp-google-time" data-time="1723839250">20:14 16 Aug 24</div></div></div><span class="rpi-stars" style="--rating:5"></span><div class="rpi-flx rpi-col4"><div class="wp-google-feedback grw-scroll" ><span class="wp-google-text">Capo by the Sea is a beautiful recovery program that offers a holistic approach towards addiction. ></div><div class="rpi-flx rpi-col6"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111918323557773090661/reviews" class="wp-google-name" target="_blank" rel="nofollow noopener">Alan H</a><div class="wp-google-time" data-time="1710677589">12:13 17 Mar 24</div></div></div><span class="rpi-stars" style="--rating:5"></span><div class="rpi-flx rpi-col4"><div class="wp-google-feedback grw-scroll" ><span class="wp-google-text">I recently stayed at Capo by the Sea (“Capo”) for 30 days due to alcoholism which has become very severe over the last 2+ years. During that time I have been through over 10 rehab/detox programs in 4 different states. Previously each time I would either stay only through detox or make it through detox and leave shortly after entering the rehab part of the program, never making it even close to a full 30 days. The reason for leaving varied but typically was for one of the following reasons: other patients, facilities, staffing, lack of freedom/mobility and/or access to electronics.<br /><br />Unlike prior detox/rehab programs, Capo checked all the boxes for me. My first search criteria was finding a place that allowed me to bring my puppies which Capo does. Being able to spend time with them when I was not in group truly made a huge difference for me and wasn’t something I had previously considered with past programs.<br /><br />With respect to the other reasons noted above, Capo also excelled above other programs. Electronics (phone, iPad, laptop, etc.) are allowed at all times unless you give them a valid reason to restrict use which I didn’t see during my stay. I think this is an often overlooked item, but it was always a big issue for me. As a working professional it is almost impossible to effectively monitor both work and personal responsibilities that may arise when you don’t have, or have very limited, access to emails for 30, 60 or 90+ days. In addition, after accomplishing certain milestones you may have the ability to take a ride share to places such as the grocery store (excellent food is already provided but some individuals wanted other options as well), gym or to get a haircut.<br /><br />The other patients that were in my groups were also largely all very intelligent working professionals around my age and I was able to benefit from their experiences in dealing with addiction in ways that I couldn’t at prior programs.<br /><br />The staff is also great across the board. I enjoyed getting the chance to know many of them and learning from their prior experiences. The staff was always responsive to any requests that I had and were extremely helpful in helping me get through the program.<br /><br />Lastly the facilities were some of the best I have experienced. The multiple houses are all very nice and upscale. The house I stayed in (Montecito) had a large fenced in back yard which was perfect for my puppies. The main house, which is where you will go to attend the daily meetings, is only a couple blocks from the ocean so it was nice being able to walk to the park overlooking the ocean during breaks.<br /><br />I hope this information is helpful. I would highly recommend Capo for anyone seeking treatment for alcohol or drug abuse.</span></div></div><svg height="16" width="16" role="none"><use href="#grw-google"/></svg></div></div><div class="rpi-slide grw-review"><div class="rpi-flx rpi-col12 grw-review-inner grw-backgnd"><div class="rpi-flx rpi-row12-center"><div class="grw-img-wrap"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="grw-img" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKBw0tO0VTM-JRdheidleewbrwmljfMf7XMBuEDcMj3hfU-0A=s56-c-rp-mo-br100" loading="lazy" alt="Mikey Mike profile picture" width="50" height="50" onerror="if(this.src!='https://capobythesea.com/wp-content/plugins/widget-google-reviews/assets/img/guest.png')this.src='https://capobythesea.com/wp-content/plugins/widget-google-reviews/assets/img/guest.png';" ></div><div class="rpi-flx rpi-col6"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101157181330153870032/reviews" class="wp-google-name" target="_blank" rel="nofollow noopener">Mikey Mike</a><div class="wp-google-time" data-time="1690349634">05:33 26 Jul 23</div></div></div><span class="rpi-stars" style="--rating:5"></span><div class="rpi-flx rpi-col4"><div class="wp-google-feedback grw-scroll" ><span class="wp-google-text">I need a pet friendly rehab.. All’s I’ve got is drugs and my dog.. I’m a visually impaired addict with a little dog.. I’ve yet to find anywhere and my dogs the last thing I can’t and won’t leave behind or give up on.</span></div></div><svg height="16" width="16" role="none"><use href="#grw-google"/></svg></div></div></div><button class="rpi-ltgt rpi-gt grw-next" tabindex="0"></button><div class="rpi-dots-wrap"><div class="rpi-dots"></div></div></div></div></div><script>(function(p){if(!p)return;let w=p.offsetWidth,m=function(a,b){return Math.min(a,b)===a};p.querySelector('.grw-row').classList.replace('grw-row-m','grw-row-'+(m(w,510)?'xs':m(w,750)?'x':m(w,1100)?'s':m(w,1450)?'m':m(w,1800)?'l':'xl'))})(document.currentScript?.parentElement)</script></div>								</div>

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<span class="sub-title">Addiction Treatment Tracks</span><h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">We Can Help!</h2>				</div>

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2bf13b5 animated-fast elementor-invisible elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="2bf13b5" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{"_animation":"opal-move-up"}" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									Capo By The Sea is one of the premier choices for addiction treatment in Orange County because of our holistic approach and personalized care. Our programs combine medical, and wellness practices that support sobriety and mental health. From residential detox to various therapy options from executive and couple tracks, we have options that will fit all walks of life. Our dedicated team is ready to help individuals to find a lasting recovery by offering a supportive, structured and compassionate environment. If you or someone you love is searching for addiction treatment in Orange County, Capo By The Sea provides a perfect place to begin a transformative journey to wellness. Our facility offers a serene and private setting. Our clients can fully focus on their recovery journey with no stress or distractions. Capo By The Sea programs are designed to address both addiction and co-occurring mental health disorders

// CTM Session Tracking and Duplicate Prevention
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  // Function to get CTM session ID
  function getCTMSessionId() {
    try {
      if (typeof __ctm !== 'undefined' && __ctm.tracker && __ctm.tracker.getSessionId) {
        return __ctm.tracker.getSessionId();
      }
      // Fallback: try to get from localStorage or generate a unique ID
      let sessionId = localStorage.getItem('ctm_session_id');
      if (!sessionId) {
        sessionId = 'ctm_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);
        localStorage.setItem('ctm_session_id', sessionId);
      }
      return sessionId;
    } catch(e) {
      console.log('CTM session tracking error:', e);
      return null;
    }
  }
  
  // Add session ID to all CF7 forms
  const cf7Forms = document.querySelectorAll('.wpcf7-form');
  cf7Forms.forEach(function(form) {
    const sessionId = getCTMSessionId();
    if (sessionId) {
      // Add hidden input for session ID
      let sessionInput = form.querySelector('input[name="ctm_session_id"]');
      if (!sessionInput) {
        sessionInput = document.createElement('input');
        sessionInput.type = 'hidden';
        sessionInput.name = 'ctm_session_id';
        form.appendChild(sessionInput);
      }
      sessionInput.value = sessionId;
      
      // Set cookie for server-side access
      document.cookie = 'ctm_session_id=' + sessionId + '; path=/; max-age=3600';
    }
  });

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

 Admissions 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 PREMIER Luxury Rehab 

IN CALIFORNIA 

 HIGH END ADDICTION & DUAL DIAGNOSIS TREATMENT 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 View Our Treatment Programs 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Innovative & Exclusive Treatment 

 Healing from Within: Mind. Body. Spirit. 

At Capo by The Sea , our expert doctors and clinicians provide holistic, medically informed treatment plans designed to heal both the brain and body from the inside out. Discover a comprehensive path to recovery—contact our Admissions Team today to learn more about our personalized programs.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 Capo by The Sea is a private and premier  addiction  and  dual diagnosis residential treatment center that offers adjunct regenerative medicine. 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Regenerative Medicine 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 NAD+ IV Drip Detox 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Addiction Treatment

Capo By The Sea clients are immersed in a unique therapeutic environment tailored to the individual. Our counselors are highly trained in uncovering and addressing the underlying mental health and medical conditions to help treat co-occurring conditions. 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 More on Addiction Treatment 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Residential Detox

Capo by The Sea offers a private drug and alcohol detox managed and overseen by an experienced team of medical and treatment professions. Receive high quality care to reduce your withdrawal symptoms and start healing. 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 More about Detox Options 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Residential Treatment

A residential treatment program involves an extended stay at our inpatient rehabilitation center, lasting from 30 days to several months in duration. The length of the stay will depend upon the severity of the addiction and on the person’s recovery goals.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Learn more about Residential 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 About Capo by the Sea 
LUXURY FACILITY & SERVICES
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 Massage Therapy 
 

 

 
 
 
 Chef-Prepared Meals 
 

 

 
 
 
 Luxury Facility 
 

 

 
 
 
 Private Rooms 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 Tranquil Setting 
 

 

 
 
 
 Spa Treatments 
 

 

 
 
 
 Holistic Treatments 
 

 

 
 
 
 Golf Therapy 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 Golf Inpatient Alcohol & Drug Rehab 

 Golf Drug Rehab at Capo by The Sea is a premier, all-inclusive recovery program for patients battling addiction and dual diagnosis conditions. 

 Executive detox is a special situation with individuals who can’t just walk away from everything in order to get treatment. Their company’s success depends on them. There’s too much at stake. A high performance career doesn’t mean everything is under control on a personal level. It happens often, someone in a high power position succumbing to dependency. Our executive alcohol detox is done in the care of professionals that help you to take that first difficult step to recovery. 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Learn More About The Program 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Addiction Treatment For Professionals
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 ADDICTION TREATMENT FOR PROFESSIONALS 

 
 

 CEO & Executives 

 
 

 Capo by the Sea offers a unique recovery program designed with the busy CEO or Executive Professional in mind. The fast-paced life of a a CEO or Executive can seem out of control when viewed by the casual observer. We offer access to phone, computer, and custom plans. 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 ADDICTION TREATMENT FOR PROFESSIONALS 

 
 

 Legal Attorneys 

 
 

 Capo by The Sea has extensive experience working with attorneys in need of chemical dependency and substance abuse treatment. Every clients needs are different and we can work with you on your schedule, offer a private room, access to personal phones/computers, and other areas that could remove barriers to getting help. 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 ADDICTION TREATMENT FOR PROFESSIONALS 

 
 

 Medical Field 

 
 

 Capo by The Sea has been working with and treating licensed medical professionals for nearly 2 decades. Our treatment team will provide a confidential assessment and review the treatment program options and protocol as a medical professional. We work with your unique situation and create a custom plan. 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 ADDICTION TREATMENT FOR PROFESSIONALS 

 
 

 Artists 

 
 

 Capo by The Sea provides premier addiction and dual diagnosis treatment tailored specifically for performing artists including musicians and actors. We understand the unique pressures of the entertainment industry and offer a discreet and supportive environment. 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
Get Help, Reach Our Admissions Team
 

 
We Do Not Take Medi-Cal, Medicare, Medicaid, Ambetter, IEHP
 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 Who are you helping? I want to help myself I want to help a loved one I want to help a patient or client I want to help an employee 
 

 

 

 
 Financial PPO Insurance HMO Insurance Ability to Private Pay Government Insurance No Money/No Insurance 
 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 NOW IN NETWORK WITH 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 Confidential Self-Assessment 

Take our confidential self-assessment to better understand your relationship with substances.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Take Assessment Now 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 Family Support Guide
 

Created by the clinical team at Capo By The Sea, this guide helps families understand addiction and take the right next steps.
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Download family support guide 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 Capo by The Sea 
 4.3 
Based on 43 reviews

powered by G o o g l e 

 review us on 

 

 

 adrienne woodward 
20:16 03 Dec 24

 

 Capo By The Sea Review – A Life-Changing Experience

I can honestly say that Capo By The Sea in Capistrano Beach, CA, has been nothing short of transformative for me. From the moment I arrived, I felt embraced by the warmth and dedication of the entire team, who are all genuinely invested in your recovery.

The setting itself is incredible–beautiful, sunny Southern California with the soothing presence of the beach nearby. The living quarters and homes are gorgeous and comfortable, creating an atmosphere that feels like a safe, healing sanctuary. The structure of the program provides a perfect balance of freedom and accountability, allowing you to feel supported while still having the autonomy to grow and heal.

Nicki, the program director, is an absolute gem! She leads with compassion, professionalism, and a deep understanding of the recovery process. The clinical team–Kim Glossbrenner, Jack Platt, Dr. Robin Fraser, and Terry Kellerman–are top-notch, providing personalized and thoughtful care to address the mental and emotional aspects of addiction recovery. They are also encouraging & willing to work with family members and loved ones in person or via Zoom, which is incredibly helpful in establishing a solid foundation for your continued recovery after returning home.

The support staff, (in no particular order) including Cat, Randy, Manny, Jack, Coral, Ryan, Lucas, Destiny, Alyssa, Chris, Brent, Tim, Chelsea, and Tony, are always there with a smile, despite having to manage our countless & incredible needs! This helps to create a positive, loving & encouraging environment. They truly make Capo feel like a second home.

One of the standout features of the program is its holistic approach. From acupuncture with Vida, meditation with Ingrid, breath-work with Matthew, Jeremy & Eric, yoga & sound baths with Ashly, and hiking in the stunning local landscape, Capo By The Sea offers a wide variety of therapeutic activities. The gym access is also great for physical health, and the massage therapy is a perfect way to relax and reset.

In addition to these tools, the program offers a very solid AA/NA program which is imperative in your initial recovery & your hopeful continued success in sobriety. The opportunities to grow as a happy & healthy human being and improve your life are limitless, if you truly want it.

The food is also a major highlight. Executive chef Pablo prepares meals that are not only delicious but nourishing–he truly goes above and beyond to ensure that each meal supports both body and soul.

John K. and Patty B., the owner & intake coordinator, respectively, have created something truly special here. Their passion for helping others is evident in every aspect of Capo By The Sea, and I am forever grateful for the miracles they are working.

Having been here twice, I can confidently say that Capo By The Sea has changed my life in profound ways. It’s a place that feels like home, and I wholeheartedly recommend it to anyone seeking a supportive, comprehensive, and life-changing recovery experience. 

 

 

 

 James Harper 
20:42 13 Nov 24

 

 These people and staff are some of the most caring and kind people ever. I struck a friendship with chef Pablo. He checks on with me from time to time. That aside, he’s a fantastic Chef! More importantly, a good man. I’m leaving people out, but Chelsea and Kimberly are amazing human beings. I cherish my ongoing relationship with Chef Pablo. He cares 

 

 

 Rose Thomas 
02:41 05 Nov 24

 

 After decades of trying to get sober, I took myself to Capo by the Sea. Through the support and insight of the caring staff, therapists, and my fellow housemates, this well thought out, holistic, and immersive program gave this 72 year old woman a renewed sense of hope.

Along with the therapy (group plus individual) there are a number of amenities; wonderful food prepared by Chef Pablo, massage therapy, acupuncture, yoga, and Saturday excursions, as well as free time every afternoon where you are encouraged to walk, go to the gym or just relax and watch a show. Just to drop a few names of people that stand out from my time at Capo; Chelsea, Chris, Ryan, Nikki, Destiny, Lucas, Therapists Kim, Cassie, Dr. Fraser, and Jack. But honestly, all the people that work there are genuine in their concern for your well-being.

The environment at Capo is a safe haven that gives one the ability to see how recovery can lead to a better way of living without the use of drugs or alcohol. If you are willing to take advantage of all they have to offer, their program will help you understand that if you do the work, you will reap the benefits of a clean and sober life. 

 

 

 Kimberly Birch 
20:14 16 Aug 24

 

 Capo by the Sea is a beautiful recovery program that offers a holistic approach towards addiction. With a diverse clinical team (specialties, gender & age), compassionate and communicative on site staff, activities including yoga, meditation, and acupuncture, Capo offers a unique experience that provides a variety of beneficial life tools in a safe place to encourage the success of their clients. There is an authentic and professional mission that is an obviously important to maintain, from the time you walk through the door to when you exit the program that extends to your journey into the real world. You leave knowing that the support continues and the resources can be called upon in the future. Myself, my family and friends are forever grateful! 

 

 

 Matthew Mottaz 
01:50 13 Aug 24

 

 What a truly amazing place that honesty cares about everyone. The NAD May seem expensive it is so worth it within just my first session started feel the difference again. I highly highly highly recommend this amazing center modalities that they offer! Thanks, John.!!!!!!!! 

 

 

 Nicole Schrup 
02:09 27 Mar 24

 

 

 

 Alan H 
12:13 17 Mar 24

 

 I recently stayed at Capo by the Sea (“Capo”) for 30 days due to alcoholism which has become very severe over the last 2+ years. During that time I have been through over 10 rehab/detox programs in 4 different states. Previously each time I would either stay only through detox or make it through detox and leave shortly after entering the rehab part of the program, never making it even close to a full 30 days. The reason for leaving varied but typically was for one of the following reasons: other patients, facilities, staffing, lack of freedom/mobility and/or access to electronics.

Unlike prior detox/rehab programs, Capo checked all the boxes for me. My first search criteria was finding a place that allowed me to bring my puppies which Capo does. Being able to spend time with them when I was not in group truly made a huge difference for me and wasn’t something I had previously considered with past programs.

With respect to the other reasons noted above, Capo also excelled above other programs. Electronics (phone, iPad, laptop, etc.) are allowed at all times unless you give them a valid reason to restrict use which I didn’t see during my stay. I think this is an often overlooked item, but it was always a big issue for me. As a working professional it is almost impossible to effectively monitor both work and personal responsibilities that may arise when you don’t have, or have very limited, access to emails for 30, 60 or 90+ days. In addition, after accomplishing certain milestones you may have the ability to take a ride share to places such as the grocery store (excellent food is already provided but some individuals wanted other options as well), gym or to get a haircut.

The other patients that were in my groups were also largely all very intelligent working professionals around my age and I was able to benefit from their experiences in dealing with addiction in ways that I couldn’t at prior programs.

The staff is also great across the board. I enjoyed getting the chance to know many of them and learning from their prior experiences. The staff was always responsive to any requests that I had and were extremely helpful in helping me get through the program.

Lastly the facilities were some of the best I have experienced. The multiple houses are all very nice and upscale. The house I stayed in (Montecito) had a large fenced in back yard which was perfect for my puppies. The main house, which is where you will go to attend the daily meetings, is only a couple blocks from the ocean so it was nice being able to walk to the park overlooking the ocean during breaks.

I hope this information is helpful. I would highly recommend Capo for anyone seeking treatment for alcohol or drug abuse. 

 

 

 Mikey Mike 
05:33 26 Jul 23
